## Description

What problem does this PR solve? What feature does it add?

**Related Issue:** Fixes #(issue number) or relates to #(issue number)

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (code improvement without behavior change)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test addition/update

---

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the test cases you added or the testing you performed:

```bash
# Example:
npm run test -- yield-evaluator
npm run test -- --coverage
```

---

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines in `PROJECT_RULES.md`
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes (with >80% coverage)
- [ ] I have updated documentation as needed
- [ ] No hardcoded values (all configuration in `config/` files)
- [ ] No `any` types used (explicit types throughout)
- [ ] Error handling is explicit (not silent failures)

---

## Screenshots / Examples (if applicable)

Add screenshots, gifs, or example output if relevant to the change.

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here (design decisions, potential issues, future improvements, etc.)

---

**Note:** PRs that don't pass CI checks cannot be merged. Make sure:
- ✅ All tests pass
- ✅ Code is formatted (Prettier)
- ✅ No lint errors (ESLint)
- ✅ TypeScript compiles with no errors
